metadata.title: Axon Command Interceptor - Layer 2 Tenant Validation

story.iWant: Axon command interceptor that validates tenant context matches aggregate
story.soThat: commands cannot modify aggregates from other tenants (Layer 2)
story.tasks: - AC1: TenantValidationInterceptor.kt implements CommandHandlerInterceptor - AC2: Interceptor validates: TenantContext.get() matches command.tenantId - AC3: All commands must include tenantId field - AC4: Mismatch rejects command with TenantIsolationException - AC5: Missing context rejects command (fail-closed) - AC6: Integration test validates: tenant A cannot modify tenant B aggregates - AC7: Validation metrics: tenant_validation_failures, tenant_mismatch_attempts

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. TenantValidationInterceptor.kt implements CommandHandlerInterceptor 2. Interceptor validates: TenantContext.get() matches command.tenantId 3. All commands must include tenantId field 4. Mismatch rejects command with TenantIsolationException 5. Missing context rejects command (fail-closed) 6. Integration test validates: tenant A cannot modify tenant B aggregates 7. Validation metrics: tenant_validation_failures, tenant_mismatch_attempts

doc.relevance: Defines Layer 2 of 3-layer tenant isolation: Axon command interceptor validation
doc.snippet: Layer 2: TenantValidationInterceptor (Axon CommandHandlerInterceptor) - Validates TenantContext.getCurrentTenantId() matches command.tenantId - All commands must include tenantId field (interface requirement) - Mismatch → TenantIsolationException (fail-closed) - Missing context → TenantIsolationException (fail-closed) - Prevents tenant A from modifying tenant B aggregates - Metrics: tenant_validation_failures, tenant_mismatch_attempts

doc.relevance: Axon interceptor patterns and command handling (Epic 2 action item)
doc.snippet: Axon MessageHandlerInterceptor pattern for cross-cutting concerns. CommandHandlerInterceptor intercepts commands before handler execution. UnitOfWork provides transactional command processing context. InterceptorChain.proceed() continues command processing or throws to reject. mode=subscribing for test event processors (Epic 2/3 pattern).

doc.relevance: Template Method Pattern for metrics instrumentation
doc.snippet: Story 3.9: MeteredTokenValidator base class with automatic instrumentation. Template Method Pattern eliminates boilerplate for metrics emission. Per-layer metrics automatically emitted (295x better than target). Apply same pattern to TenantValidationInterceptor for metrics.

doc.relevance: Business requirements for tenant validation at service layer
doc.snippet: Layer 2: Service-level validation prevents cross-tenant command execution. Commands must include tenant context for validation. Fail-closed: reject commands that violate tenant isolation.

Story 4.3: Axon Command Interceptor - Layer 2 Tenant Validation - TenantValidationInterceptor.kt implements CommandHandlerInterceptor - Interceptor validates: TenantContext.get() matches command.tenantId - All commands must include tenantId field - Mismatch rejects command with TenantIsolationException

artifact.reason: Story 4.2 populates TenantContext that this interceptor validates against
Axon Framework configuration patterns for registering interceptors
Widget aggregate will be enhanced in Story 4.6 with tenantId field
Integration test patterns for Axon command/event testing from Epic 2

constraints.constraint: All commands MUST include tenantId: String field. Create TenantAwareCommand interface for type safety. Commands implement TenantAwareCommand to guarantee tenantId field.

Missing TenantContext → TenantIsolationException (fail-closed). TenantContext.getCurrentTenantId() != command.tenantId → TenantIsolationException. Do NOT use nullable current() - use fail-closed getCurrentTenantId().
Register TenantValidationInterceptor with Axon Configuration. Use @Component + ConfigurerModule pattern for automatic registration. Interceptor runs BEFORE command handler execution.
Generic error message for security (CWE-209 protection). Message: "Access denied: tenant context mismatch" Do NOT leak tenant IDs or internal details in error messages.

Use Template Method Pattern from Epic 3 Story 3.9 for metrics. Base class handles metrics emission, subclass implements validation logic. Metrics: tenant_validation_failures (counter), tenant_mismatch_attempts (counter).

interface.name: Axon CommandHandlerInterceptor
interface.description: Axon Framework interceptor for cross-cutting concerns on command handling. Intercepts commands before handler execution, validates tenant context.

interface.name: TenantAwareCommand Interface
interface.description: Marker interface for commands that include tenant context. All multi-tenant commands must implement this interface.

interface.name: TenantIsolationException
interface.description: Custom exception for tenant isolation violations. Thrown when tenant context validation fails.

standards.standard: Constitutional TDD: Integration test BEFORE interceptor implementation. Test validates tenant A cannot modify tenant B aggregates.
Use Kotest FunSpec with @SpringBootTest for Axon integration tests. mode=subscribing for event processors (Epic 2/3 pattern). Use @Autowired field injection + init block (NOT constructor injection).

Test all validation scenarios: - Tenant A modifies Tenant A aggregate → SUCCESS - Tenant A attempts to modify Tenant B aggregate → TenantIsolationException - Missing TenantContext → TenantIsolationException - Command without tenantId field → bypasses validation (non-TenantAwareCommand)
Verify metrics emitted on validation failures. Use TestMeterRegistry pattern from Epic 3 for metrics validation.

ideas.idea: Test AC2: Validate TenantContext.getCurrentTenantId() matches command.tenantId
Test AC4: Tenant mismatch → TenantIsolationException with generic error message
Test AC6: Integration test - Tenant A creates widget for Tenant A (success)
Test AC6: Integration test - Tenant A attempts to modify Tenant B widget (fails)
Test AC7: Verify tenant_validation_failures counter incremented on mismatch
Test AC7: Verify tenant_mismatch_attempts counter incremented on cross-tenant attempt
Test command without TenantAwareCommand interface → no validation (safe bypass)
Test interceptor order: runs BEFORE command handler execution
Test concurrent commands from different tenants → isolated validation
